subcodes.first_line: O spiritual friends of Abdu'l-Baha! For some time, the disunity and lack of harmony among the friends in the city [3.5s]... ...In every Dispensation the light of Divine Guidance has been focused upon one central theme
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران روحانی عبدالبهاء مدتی بود که از اختلاف و عدم ایتلاف احباء در مدینه
subcodes.subjects: @progressive revelation; renewal of religion, @unity; oneness of humanity, @suffering and imprisonment, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @banishments of Baha'u'llah, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all
